name: io.github.Hugegreencandle/xahau-mcp
description: First MCP for the Xahau network — offline Hook WASM VM + static analyzer, read-only ledger tools.
title: Xahau MCP

environmentVariables.name: XAHAU_RPC_URLS
environmentVariables.description: Optional comma-separated override of MAINNET Xahau JSON-RPC endpoints (defaults to built-in mainnet endpoints)

environmentVariables.name: XAHAU_TEST_RPC_URLS
environmentVariables.description: Optional comma-separated override of TESTNET Xahau JSON-RPC endpoints (defaults to built-in testnet endpoints)
